summary.summary: Release notes for Trio v0.8.2: OmnipodKit is made the sole Omnipod driver (OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed) and the Add Pump/Onboarding flow now lists a single “All Omnipod Types” entry; Live Activity receives several UI fixes and enhancements (active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart with a named badge; indefinite overrides no longer collapse the chart rule to the current moment; COB string and Live Activity widget item labels were corrected/localized); a watch connectivity/back-sync fix reduces stale-data hangups on the watch; and Stats > Meals now shows today's carbs, fat, and and protein correctly. Additionally, CI/dev config bumps APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig.
summary.userFacingImpact:
Conservative summary of user impact: 
- Users of Omnipod pumps will see only the OmnipodKit driver and a single “All Omnipod Types” option when adding a pump or during onboarding (driver submodules removed).
- Live Activity widgets and the Live Activity chart will display active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, should handle indefinite overrides correctly, and have corrected/localized widget labels.
- Apple Watch users should experience faster recovery from stale data / improved back-sync behavior.
- The Meals/Stats view should now show today’s macros (carbs, fat, protein) correctly.
If you need verification of any behavioral changes in-device, please perform manual testing; the supplied sources document the changes but do not include runtime test results.
